home.title: Xtreme I.C.E.
home.subtitle: Integrated Cybersecurity Environment
home.intro: Xtreme I.C.E. is an all-in-one cybersecurity training and simulation platform built for network engineers, SOC analysts, and security educators. It combines enterprise network design, live-fire cyber range events, and hands-on SOC simulations into a single integrated environment. From building multi-site topologies to responding to real-world attack scenarios, every feature is designed to sharpen operational skills under realistic conditions.
home.feature_network_wizard_desc: build multi-site topologies with auto-generated CLI configs
home.feature_visual_editor_desc: drag-and-drop canvas with full diagram export
home.feature_cyber_range_desc: MITRE ATT&CK-mapped events with financial impact modeling
home.feature_soc_training_desc: triage SIEM alerts, investigate EDR, and generate AI incident reports
home.feature_soc_assessments_desc: scored analyst benchmarking with task tracking and hint penalties
home.feature_labs_desc: NICE Framework-aligned labs with branching tasks and progress tracking
home.feature_course_lab_builder_desc: Build and manage NICE-aligned lab courses with AI assistance
home.feature_candidate_assessments_desc: Generate role-specific hands-on technical assessments for hiring, invite candidates via email, and receive AI-scored evaluation reports with hiring recommendations.

platform.adminSummary: You have full administrator access to the Xtreme I.C.E. Cyber Range platform — a live-fire training environment built for cybersecurity professionals. Design realistic network topologies, orchestrate Red vs. Blue exercises mapped to MITRE ATT&CK, and measure analyst readiness through SOC simulations and NICE Framework-aligned labs.
platform.noAccess: Your account does not currently have any active service assignments. Contact your administrator to request access to platform features.
platform.userSummary: Welcome to the Xtreme I.C.E. Cyber Range — a live-fire training environment where defenders are built. You have access to {{count}} platform service designed to sharpen your network engineering, threat detection, and incident response skills in realistic scenarios.
platform.userSummaryPlural: Welcome to the Xtreme I.C.E. Cyber Range — a live-fire training environment where defenders are built. You have access to {{count}} platform services designed to sharpen your network engineering, threat detection, and incident response skills in realistic scenarios.

features.network_design_wizard_desc: Architect the cyber range battlefield. Build multi-site enterprise topologies — defining routing protocols, VLANs, firewall rules, and WAN links — then generate production-ready CLI configs for every device.
features.visual_design_editor_desc: Visualize your range infrastructure with a drag-and-drop canvas. Annotate nodes, trace traffic paths, and produce polished network diagrams for exercise briefings and after-action reviews.
features.cyber_range_desc: The core of the platform. Stage live-fire adversarial exercises where Red Teams execute attack chains mapped to MITRE ATT&CK while Blue Teams defend in real time. Define ingress points, flags, scoring criteria, financial impact modeling, and team-specific direction packets — all exportable as a full exercise bundle.
features.soc_training_desc: Step into the analyst seat. Triage SIEM alerts, investigate EDR telemetry, correlate IOCs across affected assets, and write incident reports — all against dynamic, AI-driven threat scenarios running on your range topology.
features.soc_assessments_desc: Measure analyst readiness with timed, scored assessments that mirror real-world threat detection challenges. Results feed directly into skill gap analysis and workforce development planning.
features.lab_scenarios_desc: Guided, hands-on cybersecurity labs aligned to the NICE Cybersecurity Workforce Framework. Each scenario features branching task paths — high performers unlock advanced challenges, while struggling students receive adaptive remediation.
features.course_lab_builder_desc: Author and publish complete cyber range training courses. Use AI assistance to generate NICE-aligned lab content, assign Kasm workspace environments, define assessment criteria, and deploy structured learning paths to your trainees.
